claim: Most AI pilot projects fail not because of code or models, but because of integration with enterprise deterministic workflows and lack of process governance
actionable: When deploying agents in enterprises, design for integration with existing deterministic workflows and establish governance from day one.
source_title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | Param Singh: Building with Mistral: Open, Powerful, and Ready to Scale

claim: Know your data (KYD) and profile your users early in development; early success with semantic retrieval often fails at scale with diverse user search patterns
actionable: Test your RAG system with diverse users and query patterns before going to production; use hybrid retrievers and profile user cohorts.
source_title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | Param Singh: Building with Mistral: Open, Powerful, and Ready to Scale

claim: Bring security and compliance teams in early; delaying compliance review costs months and requires major rework
actionable: Schedule security, compliance, and legal reviews before, not after, architecture decisions; work with them to define standards early.
source_title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | Param Singh: Building with Mistral: Open, Powerful, and Ready to Scale

claim: Use hybrid retrievers combining BM25 (term frequency) and semantic search; pre-process data to handle dense word documents with self-references
actionable: For legal/regulated documents, use hybrid retrieval (BM25 + embeddings); preprocess to remove filler and resolve self-references.
source_title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | Param Singh: Building with Mistral: Open, Powerful, and Ready to Scale

claim: Model risk review processes in regulated industries can add 6+ months to timeline; front-load conversations with compliance
actionable: In regulated industries, budget 6+ months for model risk review and compliance sign-off; engage teams at architecture stage.
source_title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | Param Singh: Building with Mistral: Open, Powerful, and Rights to Scale

claim: After launch, you must monitor for model drift and maintain guardrails; generative AI drift is harder to detect than ML drift
actionable: Use LLM-as-a-judge evaluations to continuously monitor guardrails (e.g., no legal advice) and detect drift in production.
source_title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | Param Singh: Building with Mistral: Open, Powerful, and Ready to Scale

claim: Define measurable success metrics (cost per query, new feature revenue) to justify investment and get executive buy-in
actionable: Before building, identify your Why (cost reduction or new revenue); quantify the benefit (e.g., cost per legal query) to get budget approval.
source_title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | Param Singh: Building with Mistral: Open, Powerful, and Ready to Scale

claim: Mistral AI Studio provides traces, observability, judges, workflows, and a unified AI registry for production deployment
actionable: Use Mistral AI Studio (console) to manage models, inspect traces, run evaluations, and monitor production workflows.
source_title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | Param Singh: Building with Mistral: Open, Powerful, and Ready to Scale

claim: Mistral models (Medium, Small, Large) are deployable on-prem, in cloud VPCs, airgapped, and serverless
actionable: If you need on-prem or airgapped deployment, Mistral offers flexibility that some other providers don't; evaluate this in your compliance review.
source_title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | Param Singh: Building with Mistral: Open, Powerful, and Ready to Scale
